metadata.title: Kernelia — AI news, filtered for you
metadata.description: Aggregator of AI news, classified and summarized automatically. Filter by category or search by keyword.

home.heading: Latest news
home.subheading: The freshest AI publications, classified and summarized by our agent.
home.resultsCount: {count, plural, =0 {No results} one {# article} other {# articles}}
home.loadMoreError: We couldn't load more articles. Try again.

noResults.title: Nothing here
noResults.body: No articles match those filters. Try widening your search.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.body: We couldn't load the articles. Try again in a moment.

about.title: About Kernelia
about.intro: Kernelia gathers what's published about Artificial Intelligence, classifies it with an agent, and shows it to you summarized in Spanish and English. No opinions, no noise.

subscribe.title: Subscribe
subscribe.body: Get the updates through the channel you prefer. The RSS feeds work in any reader; the social channels only post what the agent flags as most relevant.

newsletter.title: Weekly newsletter
newsletter.body: Every Sunday, one email with the 10 most relevant articles of the week as picked by the agent. Confirm your email after subscribing — you can unsubscribe with one click any time.

credits.title: Credits
credits.body: Logo, identity and code by <author>@raulfdeztdo</author>. The project is open source: any improvement, suggestion, or new source is welcome via pull request.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1: Every few hours we read the RSS feeds of hand-picked sources.
howItWorks.step2: We deduplicate by comparing canonical URLs.
howItWorks.step3: An open-source LLM tags every article with one of ten categories and writes a short summary in both languages.
howItWorks.step4: You only see articles the agent could validate — the rest stays out.

categories.title: Categories
categories.body: These are the only allowed labels. The agent is forced to pick one.

sources.title: Sources
sources.body: We only aggregate serious publications. Links always point to the original article — Kernelia does not host third-party content.

limits.title: Honest limits
limits.body: Summaries are generated by an LLM and may contain mistakes or lose nuance. To go deeper, always read the original article. Translations are machine-generated.

stack.title: Stack
stack.body: Next.js, Supabase, Drizzle, Cerebras Llama 3.1, Tailwind v4 and Vercel. Open source.

stats.title: Public stats
stats.intro: Open metrics from the agent and the database. No private telemetry, no PII. Anyone can graph Kernelia from these numbers.

tokens.title: Agent usage
tokens.body: Tokens consumed by the classifier LLM in the last 30 days. Cost exposed for transparency.

api.title: Public API
api.body: The same data in JSON is available at <link>/api/stats</link>. Open CORS, 1-hour cache, no auth.

form.label: Your email
form.success: Check your inbox — we sent a confirmation email.
form.invalid: That email doesn't look valid. Check the format.
form.rate: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
form.error: We couldn't process your request. Try again later.
form.hint: No spam, your email isn't shared. Unsubscribe from any digest in one click.

confirmed.title: Subscription confirmed
confirmed.body: Your email is active on the list. Next digest goes out Sunday at 10:00 UTC.

unsubscribe.title: Confirm unsubscribe?
unsubscribe.body: Click the button to unsubscribe from the weekly newsletter. You'll stop receiving the Sunday digest immediately.

unsubscribed.title: You've unsubscribed
unsubscribed.body: We've removed your email from the list. If you change your mind, you can subscribe again from the About page.
